name: contentforge
description: Enterprise content production pipeline with 13 agents, 19 skills, and opt-in HTTP MCP connectors. v3.9.5 splits Phase 6 internal linking into THREE categories — topical (informational), commercial (brand product/service pages), and conversion (audience-matched CTA). Adds brand_pages schema to brand profiles, renders inline Word hyperlinks (color-coded by category) in the .docx, adds Appendix D internal link map, and drops the 'no site structure = full credit' reviewer free-pass. v3.9.4 fixed pipeline orchestration to actually invoke subagents via Task tool and added generate-docx.py for real Word output with SEO/Quality/Production appendices. v3.9 supercharges the humanizer with a 29-pattern AI-detection catalog, self-critique meta-pass, and optional voice calibration. Multi-plugin coexistence: zero global hooks, zero auto-connecting MCPs.
